prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `1a2e2828`.
codex_response:
Implemented the ARC2 package for `1a2e2828`. The rule is: detect the single color that owns the uninterrupted full row or full column and return it as a `1x1` grid. The summary hint was used because it matched the official examples; no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added, since `frontiers` already exposes the needed uniform full-line objects.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1a2e2828/verifier.py#L1), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1a2e2828/generator.py#L1), and the package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_1a2e2828/__init__.py#L1). The generator matches the task family by explicitly building horizontal and vertical color bands on a zero background, then painting the winning stripe last so only that line remains unbroken across all crossings.

Verification passed end to end: `6/6` official examples and `1000/1000` generated examples. Built artifacts are [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a2e2828/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a2e2828/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a2e2828/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a2e2828/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/1a2e2828/previews/preview_03.png). I opened `preview_01.png` and the generated set looks visually on-distribution.
